Also included 'Research and Development in Production Costs' due the XSGA/XRD interaction rule: R&D is separately reported and not obviously embedded in the selected SG&A buckets, so it should also be included in XSGA_COMPONENTS for later subtraction via (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD). | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales costs, [Income Statement] Research and Development in Production Costs
